name: @rocketlang/kavachos-ee
description: KavachOS Enterprise Edition — PRAMANA Merkle ledger, HanumanG EE posture registry, dual-control approvals, maritime injection signatures, and multi-tenant isolation.
author: Capt. Anil Sharma <capt.anil.sharma@powerpbox.org>
_distribution: private — not published to npm. Distributed directly to design partners. See captain@ankr.in

_kavachos.activation: set AEGIS_EE_LICENSE_KEY env var — contact captain@ankr.in for a signed key
ee_capabilities: PRAMANA Merkle receipt chain + S3 anchoring
HanumanG EE agent delegation posture registry
Dual-control L4 approval (two approvers required for DAN-4)
